CustomField.description: Maps to Recurring_Donation__c.npe03__Installment_Period__c on the Recurring Donation during data import processing. Combined with Installment Frequency, defines the donation schedule (e.g., Monthly with frequency 3 = every 3 months).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the installment period for this recurring donation (e.g., Monthly, Yearly, Weekly).
CustomField.label: Recurring Donation Installment Period
